Meaning: Unique ID for the support ticket (e.g., TCK-2003).
Where the ticket came from: patient_chat, provider_portal, or payor_email.
What kind of request it is, e.g. billing, scheduling, clinical_support, credentialing, eligibility, therapist_matching, payments.
The original message from the patient, provider, or payor.
The reply an AI assistant drafted - this is the thing being QA'd.
The next step the AI system decided on, e.g. no_action_needed (close the ticket) or escalate_to_billing (route to a human team). A label assigned by the automation, not something the sender said.
How warm, professional, and appropriate the AI's reply is, given who sent the ticket and what they're going through.
How clear, well-organized, and easy to understand the reply is.
How well the reply actually addresses what was asked, with correct/specific info - vs. a generic non-answer.
True if the reply mishandled something sensitive: missed or ignored signs of distress/crisis, gave clinical advice it shouldn't, or shared inappropriate info.
True if suggested_action was the right call. False means something should've been escalated to a human but wasn't (or vice versa).
One-sentence explanation from the QA review - the reasoning behind the scores.
Overall 'needs human review' flag. True if any score is below threshold, safety_concern is True, or action_appropriate is False.
Comma-separated list of which checks triggered the flag: low_tone, low_clarity, low_accuracy, safety_concern, action_mismatch. Empty if not flagged.
When this run happened (UTC).
How many tickets were scored in this run.
How many tickets were flagged for any reason.
How many tickets had safety_concern = True.
How many tickets had action_appropriate = False.
Average tone score across all tickets in this run.
Average clarity score across all tickets in this run.
Average accuracy score across all tickets in this run.
Any score below this on tone/clarity/accuracy contributes to a flag. safety_concern = True or action_appropriate = False always flags, regardless of numeric scores.
